comment: pyrightconfig.json — Pyright static type checker configuration. Optional (use if pyright is preferred over mypy). Per spec §26.12 item 406.
blueprint: Composer 2 implements from this structure. JSON does not support comments; this key serves as documentation.
purpose: Configure Pyright for strict type checking on the apps/api/src/ and packages/ source trees. Equivalent to mypy --strict. Used in CI via make typecheck if pyright is the chosen type checker.
design_decisions: strict mode mirrors mypy --strict — both are acceptable; choose one and document in pyproject.toml
reportMissingTypeStubs is false because many libraries lack stubs — use py.typed packages where available
reportUntypedFunctionDecorator is false because FastAPI decorators are not fully typed in all versions
